message:
refactor(node): rename token variables in audience_token tests; rename remotecap env var to REMOTECAP_KEY

audience_token.rs: rename local 'token' variable to 'tkn' across
12 test functions for consistency and to avoid shadowing the
helper function name

main.rs: rename FRANKEN_NODE_REMOTECAP_SECRET env var to
FRANKEN_NODE_REMOTECAP_KEY with corresponding variable rename
from 'secret' to 'signing_key' for clarity

Update verification artifacts with latest gate execution results

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
